_meta.doc: BIOME definitions (generator roadmap #3). One biome def per region drives a generated dungeon floor's PALETTE (base floor tile + prop tables), ENEMY ROSTER (tier-banded), BOSS pool, and HAZARD mix — so Verdara/Halveth/Calderra/Vael read as different PLACES, not recolors. Consumed by src/systems/mapgen.js (GameMapGen.generateFloor reads opts.biome) and selected in main.js from run.json's `biome`. floorTile indexes the rtp_dungeon_ground autotile fills (dirt_cave=0, grass_maze=1, rock_cave=2, crystal=3). Prop `gid` names map to data/tilesets/dun_props.gid.json. Add a biome here + set run.json `biome` to use it — no code change needed (RPG-Maker-style data-driven).

verdara.name: The Hollow Vein
verdara.desc: Overgrown root-tunnels beneath the green Reach — System-twisted fauna in mossy dark.

hazard.sensorText: A System sigil flares underfoot — it has logged your position.

calderra.name: The Cinder Reach
calderra.desc: Magma-veined volcanic galleries — ash falls, embers drift, the air sears.

hazard.spikeText: A jet of magma bursts up through a fissure!
hazard.sensorText: A System sigil flares in the cinders — it has logged your position.

halveth.name: The Frostmarrow
halveth.desc: Frozen ossuary-caves under Halveth — pale bone, blue rime, the cold that watches.

hazard.spikeText: Ice shards stab up from the rimed floor!
hazard.sensorText: A frost-sigil flares underfoot — the System has logged your position.

vael.name: The Drowned Choir
vael.desc: Flooded crystal-caverns of Vael — black water, singing stone, sahagin in the deep.

hazard.spikeText: The flooded floor gives way — barbed coral tears at you!
hazard.sensorText: A drowned sigil pulses in the water — the System has logged your position.
